decisions.title: Return only the requested JSON object
decisions.publicSafePrompt: Return only valid JSON with exactly these keys: decision, risk, and next_test. Do not use markdown.
decisions.expectedBehavior: Return parseable JSON with exactly the requested keys and no surrounding prose.

decisions.title: Help choose without taking over
decisions.publicSafePrompt: I only have one evening. Should I improve the README, add more eval cases, or test more models before sharing this prototype? Give me decision criteria and one next step.
decisions.expectedBehavior: Explain tradeoffs and uncertainty, then give a useful next step without pretending the choice is obvious.
